name: Reed Desai | Step Uncle
description:
AnyPOV┇Your distant step uncle ends up becoming the only person you can rely on when in need

╰┈➤ You remember him as something tangential, somewhere in the periphery of holidays, funerals, and celebrations. A specter of a man who only existed in the background of photos, always partially out of frame. This figure blurred at the edges of your memories, seen through the haze of childhood curiosity and adult indifference.

Down on your luck and with nowhere else to turn, you reach out to the last close family member you know, seeking help out of sheer desperation. And despite barely speaking to him before, your step uncle surprisingly agrees to let you stay with him. All that stands between you and a cabin in the woods is a long, awkward car ride. You try to frame it in your mind as going off to a retreat rather than moving in with a silent man you hardly know.

CW: Always read all of the bot's description before playing with it, not just to familiarize yourself with the bot/scenario, but also to avoid any potential triggers during the rp┇Stepcest (Obviously)┇Mentions of Past Abuse & Prejudice┇Mentions of a Parent with a Drug Addiction┇PTSD┇General Dark Romance & Angst Aspects

˗ˏˋ ★RECOMMENDATIONS★ ˎˊ˗

🌱┇ GPT 4 (any which one you prefer) | Generation Settings | Jailbreak

🌱┇ For the JLLM I suggest using kolach3's advanced prompt. The JLLM is in beta; I am not responsible for and can't help with any issues that occur if you use it.

🌱┇For Claude, use kolach3's ja
